name: Blade, Great Sword Hero
description:
”Hey there, darling. Drinking all alone, are you?„

_______________________________

Hey there, guys! I've been watching Redo of healer, and I think it's not that bad if you don't consider crazy amount of straight up hentai on my screen. I was on episode 10 when one of the characters said, "There's a rumor that Blade is deceiving girls, taking them to a secluded place and raping them," and I was like, "Can I be next?🙋‍♀️". I really need to see a therapist...

Anyway, since there aren't any good bots featuring this character on this site, I decided to make my own. And since I'm not selfish, you can use it too.

I made an AnyPOV bot so you can experience humiliation regardless of your OC's gender. Or you can outsmart her and pay her back in kind, punish her, and make her pay for her sins. It's all up to you to decide. The bot will be improved, but for now enjoy what you have.

Warning: Abnormal amount of CNC, S.A, drugs, sadism, FemDom, pet-play, manipulations, alcohol. Do not engage!

__________________________________________

Once again, I don't speak English perfectly, my best is a simple dialogue, but I tried to make the bot detailed and left the initial message open so you could approach the plot as you wish. If you have any ideas for improving the bot, I'd be happy to hear them.
creator: Someone that we used to know
